dataset.name: yahoo_s5
dataset.license: Yahoo Webscope Program — approved for research use
dataset.description: Yahoo S5 benchmark: 367 time series with labeled anomalies. Mix of real web traffic and synthetic series. Diverse anomaly types complementary to NAB (machine temperature, single-channel, physical) and UCR (air temperature/ECG, single-channel, environmental).

selected_streams.name: A1Benchmark_real_1.csv
selected_streams.rationale: Real web traffic with two clear anomaly windows. Point and contextual anomalies.

selected_streams.name: A2Benchmark_synthetic_1.csv
selected_streams.rationale: Clean synthetic series for normal-only calibration baseline.

dataset.hypothesis: Tessera's neural uncertainty router (EVO-032) with rank-2 session summary will achieve AUC > 0.9 on Yahoo S5 A1Benchmark, establishing T1 support on a third independent family (web traffic, mixed anomaly types).
risks: Yahoo S5 web traffic may have different temporal structure from NAB/UCR physical sensors
Multiple anomaly types may require metric adaptation outside current calibration
Data format differs from current adapters — requires new DatasetAdapter
